name: synapse2
description: Connects Claude Code to the synapse2 MCP server — a Rust MCP + CLI server for Docker and SSH host management, exposing the flux (Docker/container/compose/host) and scout (SSH exec/filesystem/ZFS/logs) tools across configured infrastructure hosts.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server this Claude Code session connects to. If running locally: keep http://localhost:40080. If connecting to a remote server: set to http://hostname:40080 or https://synapse2.yourdomain.com. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp — the plugin appends it automatically.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Server mode: pick any value and use the same value in SYNAPSE_MCP_TOKEN. Client mode: paste the token your server admin configured. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32 or just gen-token.

no_auth.title: Disable service auth
no_auth.description: Run the MCP server without authentication. ONLY safe when the server is bound to 127.x (loopback). Use this for local development only — never expose an unauthed MCP server on a network interface.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. 'bearer' uses only the static API token. 'oauth' enables Google OAuth/JWT for clients like Codex while the static token remains accepted for this Claude Code plugin connection. OAuth mode requires public_url, google_client_id, google_client_secret, and auth_admin_email.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer metadata, e.g. https://synapse2.yourdomain.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth. If empty, setup derives it from an https server_url by stripping /mcp suffix. Server mode only.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth. Create a Web application OAuth client in Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com). The plugin setup script adds the required redirect URIs automatically. Server mode only.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret from the same Google Cloud Console credential. Stored in the generated plugin env file with mode 600 (owner-read-only). Server mode only.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth mode without at least one allowlisted email address. Server mode only.

synapse_hosts_config.title: Hosts config (JSON)
synapse_hosts_config.description: Inline host topology as a JSON array, mapped to the SYNAPSE_HOSTS_CONFIG env var. This is the highest-priority host source: when set it overrides SYNAPSE_CONFIG_FILE and the ~/.ssh/config fallback. Each entry describes a host the flux/scout tools can reach (e.g. name, protocol, address). Leave empty to load hosts from a config file or ~/.ssh/config instead.

synapse_config_file.title: Hosts config file path
synapse_config_file.description: Path to a hosts config file, mapped to the SYNAPSE_CONFIG_FILE env var. Used when synapse_hosts_config is empty. If neither is set, the server falls back to ~/.ssh/config for host discovery.
